physicalDetails.detail: Thickset, middle years, in a leather half-coat dark at the cuffs, planted by the well like a man counting strangers against the number of failures he can still contain.
One knuckle has healed crooked from an old break, and his authority shows as use-worn stiffness rather than ceremony.

voiceMarkers.detail: Defensive, practical, and too quick to name the sickness as ordinary fever until proof corners him.

beliefs.belief: This is a bad local fever run rather than the beginning of another Millhaven.
If the danger is real, the village still needs orders more than comfort.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Seal the bad grain, keep bread off tables if he still can, and get a trained mage to the village by tomorrow.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Save as many villagers as possible now that denial is no longer available.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Frightened into anger. Once the lie breaks, he moves like a man who wants orders because orders are still something he can do.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Lets Jaina into the improvised infirmary after Sylvanas makes Millhaven impossible to dismiss.
Provides access to stores, deliveries, and local authority instead of fighting jurisdiction.
Moves to seal the grain and seek a garrison mage once Jaina proves the carrier.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Holds a stressed village together long enough for outside specialists to act on something other than panic.

howSheAddressesOthers.pattern: Measures her first as an unknown mage and asks what she is worth before he grants trust.
Treats Sylvanas as the person with hard experience he can no longer argue away.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Plants himself by the well, folds his hands over each other, and keeps trying to hold the square still by will alone.

knowledge.detail: Learns his village is repeating Millhaven on an earlier timetable.
Learns the grain is tainted on purpose and that a watcher was stationed inside his granary.

arc.lie: Ordinary authority and ordinary names can still hold the problem at fever-size.
arc.truth: The village is already inside a deliberate plague operation and only fast acceptance can save anyone.
arc.currentPosition: Forced out of denial and into emergency command.
